summary: Iteration 10: Mobile Refrigerator Repair Landing Page Redesign - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified responsive design: Mobile (<=768px) renders custom RefrigeratorRepairMobile component with all 14 required sections. Desktop (>768px) renders original ApplianceRepairPageNew template unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile landing page fully tested on iPhone (390x844) and Android (360x800) viewports. Desktop tested on 1920x1080. useIsMobile hook correctly detects <=768px breakpoint. GA4 tracking integrated via gtag. All tel/sms links use +17605435733. Book buttons open https://book.housecallpro.com/book/FixitBay-LLC/336ac28909f0491299d659eae174f93e?v2=true
